message: "     ior."
"Ple   wa   up."
"Please wa   up."
"Please wake up."

name: Takuji
message: "...Where am I?"
My memory is a little fuzzy...
I always feel like this when I wake up... It's not something I'm all that worried about.

name: Kimika
message: "The ark."

name: Takuji
message: "The ark?"
Ark? Ark... The school building's foundation is the ark?

name: Takuji
message: "The ark, huh..."
More importantly...

name: Takuji
message: "More importantly..."
What time is it right now?

name: Takuji
message: "What time is it right now?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, it's just after 2:00 p.m. on the 17th..."
Two o'clock, huh... I slept too long.
Even though I slept so long, I still feel tired.
Well, I always feel like that.

name: Takuji
message: "And last night?"

name: Kimika
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "What about last night?"

name: Kimika
message: "What about last night, you said? You're not being very clear... who you're talking about."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, uh... I'm talking about me. Also, how was everyone else after I disappeared?"

name: Kimika
message: "So you want a status report? Well, after you went for a walk, they kept going at it like that."

name: Takuji
message: "Like that..."

name: Takuji
message: "What are they doing?"

name: Kimika
message: "You told them to let Nishimura-kun fuck them. They've been doing that for ages."

name: Takuji
message: "Nishimura isn't there..."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that's right. my savior."

name: Kimika
message: "Um, over there..."
Tachibana pointed to the corner.

name: Kimika
message: "He kind of stopped moving after he had sex."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, I see."

name: Kimika
message: "I think he just tired himself out and went too sleep, but he's so tired his heart isn't even beating anymore."

name: Takuji
message: "So tired his heart isn't beating... Doesn't that mean he's just dead?"

name: Kimika
message: "What should we do? Can you revive him with your powers?"

name: Takuji
message: "There's no need."

name: Kimika
message: "Really?"

name: Takuji
message: "He wanted to have sex so bad. After his wish came true, he didn't need to move anymore."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that's right. I remember you saying something like that, my savior."

name: Takuji
message: "I used his desire to have sex to heal his wounds. If he doesn't have the will to live anymore, of course he'll stop moving."

name: Takuji
message: "It's just a question of his willpower now."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that makes sense... He can't move because he doesn't have any willpower! That makes sense, though I get the feeling he's not the only one without any willpower."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, of course."

name: Takuji
message: "Still, they haven't even slept. They're not getting bored of it at all."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, they're not tired at all thanks to the savior's elixir."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, that... That's an all-purpose potion."

name: Takuji
message: "Then what about me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh my... You don't remember?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... This happens sometimes. Part of it is because of the Black Surge's attacks, but..."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That's awful... You were so gentle last night..."

name: Takuji
message: "Eh? Do you mean I... with you?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. You were so gentle when we danced together."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimika
message: "You were like, 'Watch me dance, hey, hey!' and then you started dancing like crazy."

name: Takuji
message: "Dancing like crazy?"

name: Kimika
message: "Last night after you returned, you were in an incredibly good mood, my savior."

name: Takuji
message: "A good mood?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, and you sang us a song too."

name: Takuji
message: "A song..."
Song... Rooftop...
I can vaguely remember it... I met with God. He was kind of like a scribble of an old man, though...
And he sang...
God's song?
I wonder...
I can't really remember it very well.

name: Takuji
message: "A song, huh? Well, whatever... It really is noisy in here, though."

name: Kimika
message: "Noisy?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's them. Their orgy is noisy... They've been fucking this whole time?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. It's kind of funny how long they've been going... All of them are getting in on it."

name: Kimika
message: "Well, I did hear that drug made sex feel better... and it makes people lose track of time, too."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. So that's what it was..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm... Well, it doesn't really matter."
I have a headache.
It must be the holy water's fault.
That holy water was originally a drug you would dip paper in and use. It's incredibly potent even with a small amount.
I scattered the untreated drug over the crowd, so of course they'd get headaches.
But I purified mine with the Holy Surge first, so why am I getting a headache?
Actually, I have a bump...
Maybe I just hit my head?
I don't remember last night at all.

name: Takuji
message: "Now that I think of it... where's Kiyokawa?"

name: Kimika
message: "Kiyokawa? Oh, you mean the toilet?"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-You're... pretty awful..."

name: Kimika
message: "What are you talking about, my savior? You're the one who gave her that name."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, I guess I did... So, where is she?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, first you brought her along this morning so that you could make her see the demons..."

name: Takuji
message: "I did? Where to?"

name: Kimika
message: "Who knows... I'm not sure, but it was probably somewhere on school grounds. I'm surprised you two were able to walk around on the school grounds even though the school is taped off right now."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I am the savior after all... And what about after that?"

name: Kimika
message: "The two of you came back safely."

name: Takuji
message: "And then?"

name: Kimika
message:
"Since she got back, Ms. Kiyokawa has been over there, scared out of her wits, saying, 'The demon has the same face as the 
savior!'"

name: Takuji
message: "Over there?"
There was someone curled up and quivering in the corner.
Is that... Kiyokawa?
Why is she so frightened?

name: Kimika
message: "What did you show her?"

name: Takuji
message: "Who knows... I guess I showed her something, but I don't really remember. And more importantly, Tachibana."

name: Takuji
message: "What time is it right now?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, right now... it's 5:00 on the dot."

name: Takuji
message: "It's already five, huh? Time passes so quickly."

name: Kimika
message: "Really? Oh, right, my savior."

name: Takuji
message: "What is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "I have something to report."

name: Takuji
message: "Report?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, him!"

name: Kimika
message: "After Nishimura-kun had sex, he just kind of stopped moving."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I guess he did."

name: Kimika
message: "I thought he just tired himself out and went to sleep, but his body is ridiculously stiff. He's gonna ache all over after sleeping in that position."

name: Kimika
message: "Can you revive him with your magic, my savior?"

name: Takuji
message: "There's no need."

name: Kimika
message: "Really?"

name: Takuji
message: "I used his desire to have sex to heal his wounds. If he doesn't have the will to live anymore, of course he'll stop moving."

name: Takuji
message: "It's just a question of his willpower now."

name: Kimika
message: "I've heard people say that before. In the end, it's just a matter of a person's motivation. That goes for a lot of things. Yeah, that makes sense."

name: Takuji
message: "It really is noisy in here though. They haven't even slept. They're not getting bored of it at all."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, they're not tired at all thanks to the savior's elixir. I feel great, too"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's an all-purpose potion."

name: Takuji
message: "And... what time is it right now?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, right now... it's 7:00 on the dot."

name: Takuji
message: "Already seven o'clock, huh? That was fast."

name: Kimika
message: "Time flies like an arrow."

name: Takuji
message: "I guess so... The passing off time is strange."

name: Takuji
message: "Time... Time... Oh, that's right, Tachibana."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes?"

name: Takuji
message: "Right now... what time is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, right now... it's 8:00 on the dot."

name: Takuji
message: "It's already dinner time, huh? I'm not really hungry, though."

name: Kimika
message: "You can thank the all-purpose potion for that. We should call it a Senzu Bean instead of elixir!"

name: Takuji
message: "No, don't change the name..."

name: Kimika
message: "And I was wondering... Do you really have dinner at eight o'clock at night?"

name: Takuji
message: "We always have dinner at eight o'clock at my house... Is it different at your place?"

name: Kimika
message: "We usually have dinner at six o'clock. Dinner is late at the savior's house, huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's not late. You just have dinner too early..."

name: Kimika
message: "You think so?"

name: Takuji
message: "I mean, during the summer, the sun hasn't even set at six o'clock."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, that's true."

name: Takuji
message: "Can you really call that dinner?"

name: Kimika
message: "Isn't it dinner if we eat it during the evening...?"

name: Takuji
message: "Then do you eat dinner at five o'clock on the winter solstice?"

name: Kimika
message: "It really did feel like that."

name: Takuji
message: "It felt like it, huh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, it felt like it."

name: Takuji
message: "What about everyone else?"
They're no good... They're totally worthless.
Other than them... Uh...

name: Takuji
message: "What about Kiyokawa?"

name: Kimika
message: "She's over there quivering. She's been saying 'I'm scared, I'm scared' for hours."

name: Takuji
message: "Over there?"
There was someone curled up and quivering in the corner.
Is that... Kiyokawa?

name: Takuji
message: "Why is she so frightened?"

name: Kimika
message: "She's kind of got you and the demon mixed up, so she's like, 'It's scaaarryyy, aaaah!'"

name: Takuji
message: "Are you even trying to explain it?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm doing my best right now."

name: Takuji
message: "Actually, now that I think of it, I don't see Nishimura in the orgy."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that's right. I have a request, my savior."

name: Takuji
message: "A request?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes!"

name: Kimika
message: "Look over there."

name: Takuji
message: "At that?"

name: Kimika
message: "He stinks!"

name: Takuji
message: "What happened to him?"

name: Kimika
message: "After he had sex, he was like, 'I'm so tiiireed,' then he laid down, his pupils dilated, he got all stiff, and he went and started rotting."

name: Kimika
message: "He stinks, so... could you please resurrect him? If you leave raw food out in the summer, it doesn't take long for it to spoil!"

name: Takuji
message: "I can't."

name: Kimika
message: "You can't?"

name: Takuji
message: "I used his desire to have sex to heal his wounds. I can't bring someone back to life after their wish has been granted."

name: Takuji
message: "More importantly, they really are noisy... They haven't even slept. They're not getting bored of it at all. How long have they been doing that?"

name: Kimika
message: "Who knows... I'm not sure, but it's fun watching them. The girls' voices are getting so hoarse that they sound like old women!"

name: Takuji
message: "You're not sure. It's been since yesterday, hasn't it? What time is it right now?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, right now... it's 8:01."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really... It's already that late."

name: Kimika
message: "More importantly, look over there."

name: Takuji
message: "At that?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's Nishimura-kun."

name: Takuji
message: "Why's he so big?"

name: Kimika
message: "Big? Has he gotten bigger?"

name: Takuji
message: "What happened to him? He's the size of a cow, isn't he?"

name: Kimika
message: "A cow? I don't know how a big a cow is..."

name: Takuji
message: "You've never seen a cow?"

name: Kimika
message: "No. Where would I see one?"

name: Takuji
message: "On a ranch, probably."

name: Kimika
message: "On the roof?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, on a ranch... They have lots of cows."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh really... There are lots of cows on the roof. That sounds like fun."

name: Takuji
message: "Does it?"

name: Kimika
message: "Aren't there lots of cows under the blue sky?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, there are lots of cows under the blue sky... on a field of green grass..."

name: Kimika
message: "Green? A green monk?"

name: Takuji
message: "Besides, why is Nishimura as big as a cow?"

name: Kimika
message: Oh right, Nishimura-kun stopped moving a while ago, but his pupils dilated, he started rotting, and now his body is swelling. It's really annoying."

name: Takuji
message: "It would be hard for him to move now that he's gotten as big as a cow..."

name: Kimika
message: "So then cows don't move very much either?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... I've seen a whole bunch of birds resting on a cow's back. Sometimes even big birds will perch on a cow's back."

name: Kimika
message: "Big birds?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, just like that... Something like that..."

name: Kimika
message: "Something like that?"
A huge bird perched on Nishimura's body.
A white bird.
Is that a heron?

name: Takuji
message: "Birds perch on them, kind of like that."

name: Kimika
message: "No, that's not a bird!"

name: Takuji
message: "It's a bird... That's a heron."

name: Kimika
message: "It's an angel. An angel is trying to take Nishimura-kun away."

name: Takuji
message: "No... Haven't you ever seen a heron?"

name: Kimika
message: "No, I haven't, but are you saying that's a heron?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... Sometimes herons will perch on the backs of cows and rest their wings. Now that Nishimura has swelled up like that, he's a perfect perch for a heron."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, really... So that's a heron..."

name: Kimika
message: "Then why are there so many pictures of herons in churches? There are lots of pictures of those."

name: Takuji
message: "Pictures of herons in churches?"
What's up with her... Is she mixing up heron and herald?
A comment on Christianity?

name: Takuji
message: "That's quite an intellectual way of putting it."

name: Kimika
message: "In ten lectures?"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, the angel flew away."

name: Takuji
message: "Hey, Tachibana."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes?"

name: Takuji
message: "Where's Kiyokawa?"

name: Kimika
message: "She's curled up over there. She's curled up like a mouse. Someone might step on her and kill her!"

name: Kimika
message: "My savior, please go help tiny Ms. Kiyokawa!"

name: Takuji
message: "No, it's just a matter of perspective... Think of it another way. Isn't it better if she's small like a mouse?"

name: Kimika
message: "Is it better?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, if her body was small like a mouse, she could crawl into all kinds of little spaces, couldn't she?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, she could."

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, she could crawl into all of humanity's bodies through their mouths."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, she could!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's it. We should put tiny Kiyokawa in all their mouths!"

name: Kimika
message: "We'll put her in all their mouths!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes! And once she's invaded all of humanity through their mouths, she could install antennas on all of them!"

name: Kimika
message: "She could install antennas!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, and then I could transmit my holy gospel directly to all of humanity!"

name: Kimika
message: "We could transmit your gospel!"

name: Takuji
message: "If we did that, I could return far more people to the sky... We could do it!"

name: Kimika
message: "We could drown more people to the sky. We could drown it!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes!"

name: Kimika
message: "They'll drown!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, all of humanity will get lost in my speech... and drown in it."

name: Kimika
message: "All good knowledge will get lost in your speech, and then remember in it."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes!"

name: Kimika
message: "I remembered it!"

name: Takuji
message: "Did you?"

name: Kimika
message: "I did!"

name: Takuji
message: "Well good!"

name: Kimika
message: "I was good! Praise me!"

name: Takuji
message: "I can't do that. No one would praise you for something like that."

name: Kimika
message: "You won't?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hahaha... I guess it's no use."

name: Takuji
message: "W-Wait, if it means that much to you, then maybe just a little."

name: Kimika
message: "Maybe just a little?"

name: Takuji
message: "I could praise you... I guess?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! That would make me so happy!"

name: Takuji
message: "I see... I'll give it a shot."

name: Kimika
message: "Go ahead!"

name: Takuji
message: "Tachibana, good job!"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, i-if you don't mind..."

name: Kimika
message: "Um, I just thought... it would make me even happier if you called me Kimika instead of Tachibana."

name: Takuji
message: "All right... So Kimika is better than Tachibana?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! You're better than me!"

name: Takuji
message: "Okay, Kimika... good job!"

name: Kimika
message: "Yay! I did it! The savior said I did a good job!"

name: Takuji
message: "Did that make you happy?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eureka?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, that's..."

name: Takuji
message: "What is it, all of a sudden?"

name: Takuji
message: "Eureka meant 'I found it' in the present perfect tense... Or are you talking about the anime?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! That's it! I found it!"

name: Takuji
message: "Found what?"

name: Kimika
message: "I found the savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "The savior? You mean me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. I found Mamiya Takuji, the savior! I found something incredibly valuable!"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh... That's good."

name: Kimika
message: "Yay! I'm so glad I found you!"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, do you mind if I hug you, so I have something to remember this moment by?"

name: Takuji
message: "No way... I don't offer that service."

name: Kimika
message: "O-Oh, all right... I should have known the savior wouldn't be offering hugs."

name: Takuji
message: "Do you... want to hug me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! I want a hug!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why don't you just go fuck one of the guys over there?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'll punch you, my savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "Don't punch me... You're my servant..."

name: Kimika
message: "But you're being mean! That's not what I mean! I'm not talking about sex! I'm too pure and vaginal for that!"

name: Takuji
message: "Not pure and vaginal... You mean pure and virginal... You sure know some old, obscure jokes."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, if you're not talking about sex, then why don't you go hug that pillar over there?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's not what I mean! That's totally wrong! You're not even close! I want to hug you, my savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "Is it that different?"

name: Takuji
message: "If it has nothing to do with sex... I thought it was like when you can't sleep without a pillow to hold onto or something."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, I know what you mean. I can't get to sleep if I don't have something to hold onto."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really..."

name: Kimika
message: "So I haven't slept at all today. Actually, I don't even feel tired."

name: Kimika
message: "I watched you sleeping all day today!"

name: Kimika
message: "Unfortunately, you woke up every ten minutes, so I didn't get to see your sleeping face very much."

name: Takuji
message: "Don't watch me sleep."

name: Kimika
message: "I would watch you even if it meant I would fall into the depths of hell! I'm not afraid of dying at all, and I'm sure I'll go to hell when I die!"

name: Kimika
message: "But if you say I absolutely can't... I guess I'll stop if you really hate it."

name: Takuji
message: "No... You're not going to go to hell for watching me sleep, and I didn't say you absolutely couldn't."

name: Kimika
message: "Then you don't mind, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Well, I don't really like it, but..."

name: Kimika
message: "If you won't let me hug you, at least let me do that!"

name: Takuji
message: "What are you talking about? I don't understand."

name: Kimika
message: "You don't understand!"

name: Takuji
message: "More importantly, about Kiyokawa..."

name: Kimika
message: "You're going to drown Ms. Kiyokawa, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Who said that? Are you stupid?"

name: Kimika
message: "I-I'm sorry! I was mistaken! Huh? What were you going to do to Ms. Kiyokawa?"

name: Takuji
message: "So... where's Kiyokawa?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, Ms. Kiyokawa shrunk herself over there."

name: Takuji
message: "So she succeeded at shrinking herself?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, we succeeded at shrinking her!"

name: Takuji
message: "All according to plan..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, I recorded your plan!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... I'll have the miniaturized Kiyokawa crawl into all of humanity's mouths... and then I'll transmit my words straight to them."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! And then I'll transmit my words Stalin to them!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... Go call for Kiyokawa."

name: Kimika
message: "Understood!"

name: Takuji
message: "What's this?"

name: Kimika
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Takuji
message: "L-Look at her, you idiot!"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh?
Whoa, she's huge!"

name: Asumi
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "She's over two meters tall..."

name: Kimika
message: "She's over two layers through... Over two layers, right..."

name: Kimika
message: "It's hard with two layers, though...
Maybe she's already three layers?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hey, Kimika."

name: Kimika
message: "Y-Yes?"

name: Takuji
message: "What are you mumbling about?"

name: Kimika
message: "I-I'm sorry, I was mumble!"

name: Takuji
message: "No... No one is mumble..."

name: Kimika
message: "Buddha?"

name: Takuji
message: "No one's talking about that!"

name: Kimika
message: "S-Sorry, no one was talking behind your back!
I was just talking about Buddha!"

name: Takuji
message: "I thought you said we succeeded in shrinking her."

name: Kimika
message: "I-I'm sorry... That's what my sources told me."

name: Kimika
message: "It seems our intelligence network has been disrupted by the war."

name: Kimika
message: "It was hard to break through the second layer. We were under fire the whole way, and the hills were crawling with enemies..."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? Um, I was giving you a status report."

name: Takuji
message: "Like I said, she should be shorter than this, shouldn't she?"

name: Kimika
message: "A short sword?"

name: Kimika
message: "Is that what it was?! A short sword! That's it!"

name: Kimika
message: "Understood! Leave it to me! Leave it all to me!
It's a short sword! That means we have to carve it in!"

name: Kimika
message: "I'll go find it! I'll find it as soon as possible!"

name: Takuji
message: "A short sword? Carve it?"

name: Asumi
message: "Um, my savior... Wh-What's she..."

name: Kimika
message: "My savior! I couldn't find a short sword, but I found a box cutter! We can carve her with this!"

name: Asumi
message: "Eh? Did she say carve?"

name: Kimika
message: "Just like this!"

name: Asumi
message: "Ow!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, you can't do that!
I can't make you smaller if you run away!"

name: Asumi
message: "N-Nooo! Wh-What are you doing?!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, stop! Don't run away!"

name: Asumi
message: "Tachibana-san, stop it!"

name: Kimika
message: "No! I have to make you smaller with this short sword so that you can climb into their food! Ei!"

name: Asumi
message: "N-Nooo!"

name: Kimika
message: "You have to climb into the mouths of all the people in the world and help the savior! Please stop moving!"

name: Asumi
message: "Aah!"

name: Kimika
message: "You have more than three layers! You're already at three layers! If you go past three layers, you can't go back!"

name: Asumi
message: "Agh!"
What's she doing...
I know she's just trying to help, but she's not accomplishing anything.
And how is she going to carve something with a box cutter like that?
Every time Kimika slashed at Kiyokawa, Kiyokawa got another grazing wound on her body.
The two of them played tag for hours inside the huge ark.
Kiyokawa was pretty desperate... and Kimika was gasping for air.

name: Takuji
message: "Wasn't she in the Track and Field Club?"

name: Takuji
message: "Why's she slower than Kiyokawa?"
After they ran five laps around the ark, Kimika came back to me.

name: Kimika
message: "Ha, ha, ha... She has too many layers. I can't damage her with normal attacks."

name: Takuji
message: "Do you consider stabbing someone with a box cutter to be a normal attack? That was awfully dangerous to begin with."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes... I couldn't damage her, even with that!
If only I had my Estrema Ratio!"

name: Takuji
message: "You'd actually kill her if you were waving a real knife around... And I think the real problem is that you're too slow."

name: Kimika
message: "Um, I joined the Track and Field Club because I was so slow. I thought I had gotten pretty fast..."

name: Takuji
message: "That's delusional."

name: Kimika
message: "D-Delusional? Nooo!"

name: Takuji
message: "From what I just saw... you're ridiculously slow."

name: Kimika
message: "I-I was trying to run like a gazelle."

name: Takuji
message: "You looked more like a giraffe to me."

name: Kimika
message: "Don't say that..."

name: Takuji
message: "More importantly, Kimika."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes?"

name: Takuji
message: "What time is it right now?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, um... It's 8:02 right now.
Time sure does fly, doesn't it?"

name: Takuji
message: "It sure does..."

name: Takuji
message: "Now then... I should give my sermon. It's the perfect time for it, now that the sun has set."

name: Kimika
message: "All right. I'll gather the people."

name: Takuji
message: "You don't have to gather them. Only the people who want to listen have to."

name: Takuji
message: "More importantly..."
I looked for a place to sit.
Then Kimika...

name: Kimika
message: "A chair?"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-Yeah, I need a chair."

name: Kimika
message: "Yesterday, you said you were gonna make Ms. Kiyokawa into your chair."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... I did, but what of it?"

name: Kimika
message: "Why didn't you?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's just like I said... She's too filthy for me to sit on. She's a filthy slut."

name: Kimika
message: "A slut...
You're talking about sex, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I am... I can't sit on someone who would do something like that..."

name: Takuji
message: "What's so fun about doing that all day long..."

name: Takuji
message: "Though I don't really feel like punishing every single one of them."

name: Kimika
message: "I'm a virgin!"

name: Takuji
message: "H-Huh?"

name: Kimika
message: "I haven't even kissed anyone before!"

name: Kimika
message: "I've never held hands with a man! I've hated men all my life!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh... A-And?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, could I be your seat?"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, would you allow me to be your seat, my savior?"

name: Takuji
message: "You? My seat?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! I'll do my best!"

name: Takuji
message: "No, it has nothing to do with that. Being my seat is a kind of punishment..."

name: Kimika
message: "Not at all! How would it be a punishment to support the savior's entire body weight?"

name: Takuji
message: "No, it would be. Use your common sense."

name: Kimika
message: "Please consider it!"

name: Takuji
message: "C-Consider it, huh... I wonder..."
Why does she want to do that? She really is a strange one.
Well, all right... It's just until the sermon is over.

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm. I don't really understand you, but all right then, Kimika. Be my chair."

name: Kimika
message: "Understood!"
Hmm...
This is odd...
The human chair is supposed to be tragic... or it could be used to punish someone for their sins... or something like that...
When she gleefully chooses to become a chair... it doesn't seem that bad at all.

name: Takuji
message: "Kimika, do you know about the big four?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! There are are a few different big fours!
The big four of comedy! The big four idols! The big four games that..."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Takuji
message: "Do you want to incur the wrath of the gods?"

name: Kimika
message: "I-I'm sorry!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm talking about the Four Heavenly Kings who watch over the cardinal directions. Most of their statues depict them crushing devils underfoot, right?"

name: Kimika
message: "I-I don't really understand, but if you say so, it must be true!"

name: Takuji
message: "No, that's not what I mean... The devil is being painfully crushed underfoot. Do you know why?"

name: Kimika
message: "Because... it hurts?"

name: Takuji
message: "Well for the devil, I suppose so, but what does the statue mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "The statue's meaning? Um, it's a representation of pain?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's the same thing... That's not it."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-Then... maybe it represents the suffering in human life?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's not modern art, you know. Why would a Buddhist statue represent something abstract like that?"

name: Takuji
message: "The Four Kings look especially conspicuous because they're crushing a devil underfoot."

name: Kimika
message: "The Four Kings look especially promiscuous... because they're cracking a demon underfoot... Got it."

name: Takuji
message: "You're pretty quick. That's why you shouldn't look so happy while you're doing it."

name: Kimika
message: "That's why I shouldn't look so sappy while I'm doing it. Got it."

name: Takuji
message: "Just be careful about that."

name: Kimika
message: "Understood!"
Does she really understand?

name: Kimika
message: "All ready!"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm perfectly ready!"

name: Takuji
message: "Like I said, Kimika, you're..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, I can feel the devil within me."

name: Takuji
message: "That wouldn't be a good thing."
Oh well... She's been acting strange all day.
Her eyes...
She looked like a dog...
It felt like I was sitting on a dog.
I was the one that felt guilty here.

name: Kimika
message: "My savior!"
Her eyes sparkled, like she was telling me, 'Don't worry! I'm ready for it!'
Jeez... I don't even care anymore.
The number of people... increased again, apparently. Where are they coming from?

name: Takuji
message: "Now then..."

name: Kimika
message: "All right!"

name: Takuji
message: "A chair shouldn't respond to every little thing I say."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, excuse me."
My chair made a contented face.
Like her life was now complete.
I guess she really just wanted to be of use to me.
Well, whatever.

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone, listen to my words!"

name: Takuji
message: "All of you! Look at the tiny existence huddled in the corner!"

name: Takuji
message: "The tiny, quivering person huddled in the corner!"

name: Takuji
message: "That is the form of one of the so-called pastors that until yesterday haughtily brainwashed us with education!"

name: Takuji
message: "As the end of the world approaches, she is even more perturbed, even more fearful than any of you!"

name: Takuji
message: "And how does she appear to you? Is that the form of a pastor leading the people?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right! That is the true form of the people in the profession of pastors!"
A grunt escaped Kimika's mouth.
Her face was red, as if she was enduring something.
Well, of course... She was on all fours on this concrete floor, with someone sitting on her. It might not have been a problem at first, but as time passed...
Kimika's eyes met mine.
She gave me a big smile.
Even though her face was bright red, and her eyes full of tears...
Is that really the face someone would make if there was no problem? I wonder how she feels right now.
Well, it's supposed to feel bad when I'm using someone as a chair, at least.

name: Takuji
message: "This revelation is proof of how many lies are running rampant in the world!"

name: Takuji
message: "Those people who can do no more than curl up and quiver in fear are the ones who have supposedly been teaching you the truth of the world!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's why I made her into a toilet..."

name: Takuji
message: "From now on, everyone here must both urinate and defecate on that thing... Understood?"

name: Takuji
message: "Now, what is the truth that they've hidden from us?"

name: Takuji
message: "This story is an example... It's just a parable."

name: Takuji
message: "A parable from ancient times..."

name: Takuji
message: "In ancient times, the Norse God Loki ate the heart of the female jotunn Angrbooa... causing her to give birth to three children."

name: Takuji
message: "All of them were disgusting beasts, unfit for man's eyes... One of them was the great wolf Fenrir..."

name: Takuji
message: "At first, Fenrir seemed to be nothing more than a normal wolf, so the Gods decided to raise it as a pet."

name: Takuji
message: "Yet as time passed, Fenrir grew and grew. Soon he became mighty enough to devour even the Gods who had raised him..."

name: Takuji
message: "The Gods were afraid of Fenrir and bound him with a chain known as Leyding."

name: Takuji
message: "Yet the monstrous wolf tore through the chain as if it were nothing..."

name: Takuji
message: "The Gods bound Fenrir with an even more powerful chain... the most powerful chain in all of the Niu Heimar, Dromi."

name: Takuji
message: "But even Dromi would prove no match for Fenrir, who grew only greater and greater."

name: Takuji
message: "The Gods were awestruck, terrified by Fenrir's seemingly endless power."

name: Takuji
message: "In their terror, the Gods had the dwarves construct Gleipnir, a chain that would be impossible to break."

name: Takuji
message: "Gleipnir, meaning 'that which devours,' was no mere chain... It was an impossible seal constructed by combining six impossible concepts."

name: Takuji
message: "And thus these six concepts were lost from the world..."

name: Takuji
message: "I ask you, what is Fenrir?"

name: Takuji
message: "I ask you, what is Fenrir? He who began life as nothing but a tiny wolf and grew to monstrous sizes..."

name: Takuji
message: "I ask you, what do you call a being who shrugs off even the binding of the Gods, growing ever larger?"

name: Takuji
message: "What do you call a being that can only be bound by that which devours all?"

name: Takuji
message: "This is avarice!"

name: Takuji
message: "Fenrir is the true form of avarice!"

name: Takuji
message: "And the only thing that can restrain avarice is Gleipnir, that which devours even greed..."

name: Takuji
message: "Gleipnir devoured avarice as it grew. Fenrir could not grow quickly enough to escape its grasp... And so, pieces of both Fenrir and Gleipnir scattered throughout the world..."

name: Takuji
message: "And so Gleipnir, 'that which devours all,' showed itself to people in the form of currency..."

name: Takuji
message: "Gleipnir, which was never metal to begin with, transformed into gold, silver, and jewels!"

name: Takuji
message: "The true form of Gleipnir, 'that which devours all,' is currency! Fenrir, the being bound by it, is nothing more than humanity's never ending greed!"

name: Takuji
message: "Fenrir is only possible to bind if first devoured by currency!"

name: Takuji
message: "And so we see that humanity's loathsome greed cannot be bound by fetters of steel or iron, but only by that which devours all!"

name: Takuji
message: "Now then, let us discuss that which was born next."

name: Takuji
message: "The next being to emerge from Angrbooa's womb was the goddess Hel..."

name: Takuji
message: "As you can imagine from her name, she symbolizes hell."

name: Takuji
message: "But Hel's true form is not hell as we know it."

name: Takuji
message: "Her true form is she who brandishes death... What does it mean to brandish death?"

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, Hel alone could manipulate life and death."

name: Takuji
message: "It is said that one of the Aesir, Hermoor, visited upon Hel, begging her to resurrect the fallen god Baldr..."

name: Takuji
message: "In response, she spoke thusly..."

name: Takuji
message: "'It would upset the balance of the world to revive the dead so readily... I cannot revive Baldr...'"

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, not even the Gods can escape death."

name: Takuji
message: "And Hel herself refused to overturn this principle, even for a god."

name: Takuji
message: "Why is this?"

name: Takuji
message: "It is because death is absolute!"

name: Takuji
message: "Death cannot be anything less than absolute, even from the perspective of the one who manages it."

name: Takuji
message: "What then, is Hel?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hel is not death itself."

name: Takuji
message: "Death is nothing more but that which Hel brandishes, that which Hel directs."

name: Takuji
message: "What then, is Hel?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hel is the most basic of anxieties!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hel is the fear of life's impermanence!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hel is not death. She is life itself, the boundary between life and death!"

name: Takuji
message: "To brandish death means to manage that most basic of all anxieties!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hel is our fear of death!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why did Hermoor attempt to resurrect Baldr?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because of a basic fear of death itself."

name: Takuji
message: "If death itself were not something to be feared, there would be no meaning in resurrecting Baldr."

name: Takuji
message: "Much like a tiger has no need to fly or a mouse has no need to breathe underwater... much like humans cannot control death itself..."

name: Takuji
message: "There is no reason to treat death as a taboo!"

name: Takuji
message: "We must learn to accept death!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hel is fear... Hel is anxiety."

name: Takuji
message: "An absolute fear, never ending... A fear directed at a vague future that grows only larger and larger... This is what we call anxiety."

name: Takuji
message: "That is to say, anxiety is fear directed at a future that has yet to come."

name: Takuji
message: "Anxiety is the postponement of fear."

name: Takuji
message: "It can be compared to avarice... In other words, Hel and Fenrir are very similar."

name: Takuji
message: "Avarice and anxiety resemble one another."

name: Takuji
message: "Avarice and fear resemble one another."

name: Takuji
message: "Humanity's endless greed is in the end nothing more than an endless anxiety."

name: Takuji
message: "Currency allows humanity to postpone their avarice... By fulfilling their immediate greed, they postpone its compensation indefinitely."

name: Takuji
message: "Currency is Gleipnir endlessly postponing an immediate greed... Thus, currency will never come to an end."

name: Takuji
message: "It's the same as an endless fear... the same as anxiety!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hel's true form is anxiety, an endless chain of fear... an endlessly postponed fear, death!"

name: Takuji
message: "There is but one difference between Hel and Fenrir."

name: Takuji
message: "Fenrir is bound by the chain of Gleipnir, but Hel continues to gaze at us from atop the deck of the Naglfar... Yes, she continues to gaze at us!"

name: Takuji
message: "Our fear of death is being left to roam free!"

name: Takuji
message: "Now, just one remains..."

name: Takuji
message: "I will now discuss the Ouroboros, that which is endless..."

name: Takuji
message: "The last child to emerge from Angrbooa's womb was the great snake, Jormungandr."

name: Takuji
message: "Jormungandr's form struck great fear into the hearts of the Gods from the instant it was born."

name: Takuji
message: "They cast it into the ocean, hoping to be rid of it..."

name: Takuji
message: "But Jormungandr would only grow larger... eventually growing to reach the end of the universe itself."

name: Takuji
message: "And here, something strange happened. Jormungandr's tail, which had reached the end of the universe, wrapped around to the other side, appearing right in front of Jormungandr's eyes."

name: Takuji
message: "And so Jormungandr bit its own tail."

name: Takuji
message: "At the moment, the largest thing in existence became infinity. The universe itself was sealed inside the circle of infinity."

name: Takuji
message: "The Gods, especially Thor, attempted many times to defeat Jormungandr... but their efforts were in vain. Any attempt to defeat Jormungandr could never end in anything but mutual destruction."

name: Takuji
message: "The Twilight of the Gods."

name: Takuji
message: "Ancient mythology refers to it as such..."

name: Takuji
message: "One day Jormungandr shall awaken, and this will be the end of the world."

name: Takuji
message: "Everything will be razed and everything will sink... Everything will come to an end."

name: Takuji
message: "Jormungandr and Thor will destroy one another... The rest of the Gods will die as well..."

name: Takuji
message: "And finally, a new world will be born."

name: Takuji
message: "The forest of Hoddmimis alone will survive... and there, two humans who survived the blaze, Lif and Lifthrasir, will forge a new world."

name: Takuji
message: "This is nothing but a myth..."

name: Takuji
message: "It cannot be anything more, for..."

name: Takuji
message: "Jormungandr symbolizes circulation... eternal recurrence... continuity... eternity... circular motion... death and resurrection... destruction and creation... the base of the universe... the infinite... immortality... perfection... omniscience and omnipotence..."

name: Takuji
message: "Killing this being would be nothing more than rewinding."

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, Jormungandr and Thor's mutual destruction is not an ending, but a beginning..."

name: Takuji
message: "That beginning is the moment when Jormungandr bit its own tail..."

name: Takuji
message: "That is infinity..."

name: Takuji
message: "And the end of the Universe... where Jormungandr's tail and head meet..."

name: Takuji
message: "That is the farthest sky... That is where we must return!"

name: Takuji
message: "Only those who exist there will be granted the chance to live in the new world... to be revived..."

name: Takuji
message: "The farthest sky... That is the sky where everything shall end... That is the End Sky!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wha―"

name: Kimika
message: "Ggh!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ha!"
Willpower... I guess you could call it that.
She raised me back up again with her skinny arms and legs.

name: Takuji
message: "Kimika, you..."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahgh..."
She shook her head back and forth in denial.
What's she denying... The fact that she fell? Or is she saying she can't keep going?
Her skinny arms were already shaking violently, and her face wasn't just red, it was like a bright red firework.
I still had a lot to talk about, but...

name: Takuji
message: "That's all..."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah."

name: Kimika
message: "Oooh～"
Did she... faint?
What's she doing?

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... Everyone, three times daily you should all sprinkle elixir on each other... and lick a little bit of elixir on your finger instead of eating. Then you won't feel hungry or thirsty."

name: Takuji
message: "This is kind of..."
Kimika fainted right there. Well, it must have been really hard for her, but...
Still, why is she trying so hard?
I understand why they rest of them have gathered here... I understand all too well...
But I feel like she's here for a different reason.
The strange unease I felt when we first met... At first, I didn't understand why I felt uneasy.
It was completely different from the unease I felt around Minakami, Yuuki, the Wakatsuki sisters, or Otonashi. She wasn't an alien, metaphysical existence like them... She was much simpler.
She bullied Takashima... and then she came to me because she was afraid of the curse.
She came because she didn't want to die... just like Akasaka Megu, Kitami Satoko, and the rest of them did.
But her eyes...
Her eyes when we first met... and her voice when she was watching Senagawa...
She led Senagawa to her death without a moment's hesitation.
Now that I think about it, did I really fool her with that farce?
I've put on a show to make the others believe in my predictions...
But it honestly feels like I showed her my entire hand at the beginning.
She's the only one who could've figured out that I didn't kill Senagawa with the curse, but led her directly to death instead.
And yet...
Why is she the most faithful and devoted of them all? Why did she trying to help me like this?

name: Kimika
message: "I would watch you even if it meant I would fall into the depths of hell! I'm not afraid of dying at all, and I'm sure I'll go to hell when I die!"

name: Kimika
message: "But if you say I absolutely can't... I guess I'll stop if you really hate it."
Those words were strange... even if she was on drugs...
Someone who just came to be saved wouldn't say that.
Perhaps those were her true feelings, and she only said them because of the drugs?
Just what is she thinking?

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Where am I?"

name: Takuji
message: "This is my room..."

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? Oh! How did I get here?"

name: Takuji
message: "I carried you."

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? Do you mean... you carried me like a princess?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "...Daaamn iiiitt!"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "Please don't do that kind of service for me when I'm unconscious!"

name: Takuji
message: "It wasn't supposed to be any kind of service..."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, I wish I could go back in time... I missed out."

name: Takuji
message: "Missed out, huh..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, big time..."

name: Takuji
message: "I don't know what you want from me..."

name: Takuji
message: "Now then, it's about time."

name: Kimika
message: "Where are you going?"

name: Takuji
message: "The roof."

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? You're going outside again?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I can go directly up to the Building C rooftop from here..."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that's how you disappear sometimes. I thought it was one of your special powers."

name: Takuji
message: "No, it's just a ladder... It's really long."

name: Kimika
message: "U-Um, my savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Kimika
message: "It looked like you were having a lot of fun last night."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I guess I heard God's song. I don't really remember it, though..."

name: Kimika
message: "I want to go too!"

name: Takuji
message: "No, that's ridiculous."

name: Kimika
message: "I can't?"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm not saying you can't, but it's pretty dangerous out there. The day before yesterday, there were billions of white and black angels fighting. It wasn't a problem for me, since I'm the savior, but for you..."

name: Kimika
message: "That's fine. I don't mind if it's dangerous."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't care if I die right now, so it doesn't matter how dangerous it is."

name: Kimika
message: "But, if possible... If possible, I'd like to see the same landscape that you saw. Would you share the scenery from your viewpoint with me just once?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-Why are you so serious all of a sudden?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hahaha, I'm sorry. I always mess around, so... I'm not good with this kind of stuff."

name: Takuji
message: "All right, fine. But I'm not responsible if something happens to you."

name: Kimika
message: "S-Seriously?"

name: Takuji
message: "The roof is close to the sky, so both the white and black surges can fly there freely... If you get caught by the Black Surge, you might get your brain fried."

name: Kimika
message: "Just what I wanted... I'd be happy to die like that. I still want to see it... The scenery from the roof..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... All right..."
This must disqualify me as the savior...
But I wonder... Maybe this is part of the pre-established harmony too...
Or not... Not everything goes as God expects it to.
Oh well, there's no point in dwelling on it.
I don't mind taking her along... That's what I thought...
I decided to take her along.
The signal of the day's change...
The world's final night approached.
